channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's shadow AI policy
item.description: The Trump administration entered office promising to keep government out of the AI industry's way. It hasn't worked out that way. Why it matters: The W...

item.title: Trump's SAVE Act fixation creates Senate gridlock
item.description: President Trump persists with the SAVE America Act, despite Senate Republicans repeatedly signaling it will not pass.

item.title: Inside the White House's AI power center
item.description: The Trump administration's AI team is being assembled on an ad hoc basis, mirroring its evolving AI policy.

item.title: Arizona emerges as test case for AI's energy and water crunch
item.description: This desert region is a bellwether for data center growth as the tech sector faces rising temperatures and scarce resources.
